briefdescription.para: Audio group change detect handler.
Active channel change detect handler.
Sample rate change detect handler.
Asynchronous data flag change detect handler.
Aes cs update detect handler.
Aes cs change detect handler.
Channel status change detect handler.
Video properties change detect handler.
FIFO Overflow detect handler.
Parity error detect handler.
Checksum error detect handler.
Number of handler types.
These constants specify different types of handlers and is used to differentiate interrupt requests from the XSdiAud peripheral.
Group 1.
Group 2.
Group 3.
Group 4.
Group numbers.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different Group numbers

briefdescription.para: Sampling Rates.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different audio Sampling Rates

briefdescription.para: 0 - 20 Bit Audio Sample
1 - 24 Bit Audio Sample
Sample Size.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different Sample Size

briefdescription.para: AES channel pair.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different aes channel pairs

briefdescription.para: Asynchronous data flag.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different asynchronous data flag

briefdescription.para: Channel 1 of Group 1/2/3/4.
Channel 2 of Group 1/2/3/4.
Channel 3 of Group 1/2/3/4.
Channel 4 of Group 1/2/3/4.
Channel number in any Group.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different channel numbers in Group 1 or 2 or 3 or 4

briefdescription.para: Video Rate.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different video rates

briefdescription.para: Video Scan.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different video scans

briefdescription.para: Video Family.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify different video families

briefdescription.para: 1 channel
2 channels
3 channels
4 channels
5 channels
6 channels
7 channels
8 channels
9 channels
10 channels
11 channels
12 channels
13 channels
14 channels
15 channels
16 channels
32 channels
Number of Channels.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify number of channels

briefdescription.para: channel 1
channel 2
channel 3
channel 4
channel 5
channel 6
channel 7
channel 8
channel 9
channel 10
channel 11
channel 12
channel 13
channel 14
channel 15
channel 16
channel 17
channel 18
channel 19
channel 20
channel 21
channel 22
channel 23
channel 24
channel 25
channel 26
channel 27
channel 28
channel 29
channel 30
channel 31
channel 32
Channel Number.

detaileddescription.para: These constants specify Channel number

briefdescription.para: Callback function pointer type for SDI audio events, invoked with a user-defined reference parameter.

description.para: Register offsets for the XSdiAud Embed/Extract device

briefdescription.para: SDI Audio Module control register offset.
SDI Audio Soft reset register offset.
SDI Audio Interrupt enable register offset.
SDI Audio Core version register offset.
SDI Audio Interrupt status register offset.
SDI Audio Embed Video control register offset.
SDI Audio Audio control register offset.
SDI Audio valid channels register offset.
SDI Audio mute channels register offset.
SDI Audio group presence register offset.
SDI Audio Extract FIFO overflow status register offset.
SDI Audio Extract channel status register0 offset.
SDI Audio active channel status register offset.
SDI Audio sample rate status register offset.
SDI Audio async channel pair status register offset.
SDI Audio GUI parameters register offset.

sectiondef.header: Core Configuration register masks and shifts of XSdiAud device

briefdescription.para: SDI Audio Embed enable or Extract enable shift.
SDI Audio Embed enable or Extract enable mask.
SDI Audio Embed soft reset aclk shift.
SDI Audio Embed soft reset aclk mask.
SDI Audio soft reset sclk shift.
SDI Audio soft reset sclk mask.
SDI Audio version shift.
SDI Audio version mask.
SDI Audio Embed video control family shift.
SDI Audio Embed video control family mask.
SDI Audio Embed video control rate shift.
SDI Audio Embed video control rate mask.
SDI Audio Embed video control scan shift.
SDI Audio Embed video control scan mask.
SDI Audio Embed video control external line enable shift.
SDI Audio Embed video control external line enable mask.
SDI Audio Embed audio control SD sample rate shift.
SDI Audio Embed audio control SD sample rate mask.
SDI Audio Embed audio control SD sample size shift.
SDI Audio Embed audio control SD sample size mask.
SDI Audio Embed audio control asynchronous data flag shift.
SDI Audio Embed audio control asynchronous data flag mask.
SDI Audio Embed audio control aes channel pair shift.
SDI Audio Embed audio control aes channel pair mask.
SDI Audio Embed AXIS channel count shift.
SDI Audio Embed AXIS channel count mask.
SDI Audio Embed Mux group select shift.
SDI Audio Embed Mux group select mask.
SDI Audio group present value shift.
SDI Audio group present value mask.
SDI Audio group present valid shift.
SDI Audio group present valid mask.
SDI Audio interrupt status update shift.
SDI Audio interrupt status update mask.
SDI Audio interrupt group change detect shift.
SDI Audio interrupt group change detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt active channel change detect shift.
SDI Audio interrupt active channel change detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt sample rate change detect shift.
SDI Audio interrupt sample rate change detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt asynchronous data flag value change detect shift.
SDI Audio interrupt asynchronous data flag value change detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt aes channel status value update shift.
SDI Audio interrupt aes channel status value update mask.
SDI Audio interrupt aes channel status value change shift.
SDI Audio interrupt aes channel status value change mask.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt video properties change detect shift.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt video properties change detect mask.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt FIFO overflow detect shift.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt FIFO overflow detect mask.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt checksum error detect shift.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt checksum error detect mask.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt parity error detect shift.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt parity error detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt status update shift.
SDI Audio interrupt status update mask.
SDI Audio interrupt status group change detect shift.
SDI Audio interrupt status group change detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt status active channel change detect shift.
SDI Audio interrupt status active channel change detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt status sample rate change detect shift.
SDI Audio interrupt status sample rate change detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt status asynchronous data flag value change detect shift.
SDI Audio interrupt status asynchronous data flag value change detect mask.
SDI Audio interrupt status aes channel status value update shift.
SDI Audio interrupt status aes channel status value update mask.
SDI Audio interrupt status aes channel status value change shift.
SDI Audio interrupt status aes channel status value change mask.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt status video properties change detect shift.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt status video properties change detect mask.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt status FIFO overflow detect shift.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt status FIFO overflow detect mask.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt status checksum error detect shift.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt status checksum error detect mask.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt status parity error detect shift.
SDI Audio Extract interrupt status parity error detect mask.
SDI Audio Extract audio clock phase enable shift.
SDI Audio Extract audio clock phase enable mask.
SDI Audio Extract AXIS channel count shift.
SDI Audio Extract AXIS channel count mask.
SDI Audio Extract DMux group select shift.
SDI Audio Extract DMux group select mask.
SDI Audio Extract DMux mute channel shift.
SDI Audio Extract DMux mute all channels mask.
SDI Audio Extract Dmux mute channel 1 mask.
SDI Audio Extract Dmux mute channel 2 mask.
SDI Audio Extract Dmux mute channel 3 mask.
SDI Audio Extract Dmux mute channel 4 mask.
SDI Audio Extract control packet status sampling rate shift.
SDI Audio Extract control packet status sampling rate mask.
SDI Audio Extract control packet status group active channel shift.
SDI Audio Extract control packet status group active channel mask.
SDI Audio GUI Channels parameter shift.
SDI Audio GUI Channels parameter mask.
SDI Audio GUI UHD SDI standard parameter shift.
SDI Audio GUI UHD Standard parameter mask.
SDI Audio GUI audio function parameter shift.
SDI Audio GUI audio function parameter mask.
SDI Audio GUI AXI-lite enable parameter shift.
SDI Audio GUI AXI-lite enable parameter mask.
SDI Audio GUI Channel status extract parameter shift.
SDI Audio GUI channel status extract parameter mask.
Input Operations.
Output Operations.
Reads a 32-bit value from a register in the SDI Audio hardware.

parameterdescription.para: The base address of the SDI Audio device.
The offset of the register to read from the base address.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value read from the specified register.
This is a macro that directly accesses hardware registers. Ensure that BaseAddress is valid and RegOffset is within the valid register address range.

briefdescription.para: This function writes a 32-bit value to a register in the SDI Audio hardware.

parameterdescription.para: The base address of the SDI Audio device.
The offset of the register to write to from the base address.
The 32-bit value to write to the specified register.

simplesect.para: This is a macro that directly accesses hardware registers. Ensure that BaseAddress is valid and RegOffset is within the valid register address range. This macro does not perform any error checking on the input parameters. Use with caution to avoid unintended side effects on the hardware.

memberdef.name: XSdiAud_Embed_RegMap
memberdef.initializer: = { {XSDIAUD_INT_EN_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_INT_STS_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_EMB_VID_CNTRL_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_AUD_CNTRL_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_VALID_CH_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_VALID_CH_CNT}, {XSDIAUD_MUTE_CH_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ACT_GRP_PRES_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ACT_CH_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_SR_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ASX_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, }

memberdef.name: XSdiAud_Extract_RegMap
memberdef.initializer: = { {XSDIAUD_INT_EN_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_INT_STS_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_AUD_CNTRL_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_VALID_CH_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_VALID_CH_CNT}, {XSDIAUD_MUTE_CH_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ACT_GRP_PRES_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_EXT_FIFO_OVFLW_ST_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ACT_CH_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_SR_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ASX_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, }

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the XSdiAud.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the XSdiAud includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the XSdiAud.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the XSdiAud.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the XSdiAud.

briefdescription.para: This function reads all the Channel Status registers and writes to a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a pointer to a buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the core version register and returns its value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

simplesect.para: core version register value is returned.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Status register and returns its value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

simplesect.para: Interrupt status register value is returned.

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function sets the sampling rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the sampling rate, it is enum XSdiAud_SampRate, it can be anyone of these 000 - 48 KHz, 001 - 44.1 KHz, 010 - 32 KHz

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function sets the sample size in only SD Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the sample size, it is enum XSdiAud_SampSize, it can be 0 or 1. 0 - 20 Bit 1 - 24 Bit

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function sets the asynchronous data flag.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the async data flag, it is enum XSdiAud_Asx, it can be 0 or 1. 0 - Synchronous audio 1 - Asynchronous audio

briefdescription.para: This Audio function selects the aes channel pair.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the async data flag, it is enum XSdiAud_AesChPair, it can be any value between 0 to 16.

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function sets the video properties of the image like transport scan, transport rate and transport family.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the struct containing the video family, rate and video scan information.

briefdescription.para: This Audio Embed function enables the external line number.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
can be 0 or 1, 0 is to disable and 1 is to enable

briefdescription.para: This Audio Extract function sets the clock phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
enables the use of clock phase data, 0 is to enable 1 is to disable

briefdescription.para: This function detects the Audio groups and returns the groups which are present.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a pointer tp no. of active groups and also which groups are active.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the channel valid register.

detaileddescription.para: Based on the mask provided the corresponding channels are embedded/extracted onto sdi.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the 32 bit mask used to set the specific channels.

briefdescription.para: This function mutes a specific channel based on the mask provided.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a 32 bit mask used to mute specific channels.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the FIFO overflow status.

detaileddescription.para: Each bit when read as 1, indicates that RX Sample FIFO for that group is overflowing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

simplesect.para: Returns a u8 value, we can know the group overflowing using the bits set in this value.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the active channel information decoded from audio control packet.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is the pointer to no. of active channels and the channels active in each group.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the sample rate information decoded from audio control packet (0 - 48 KHz, 1 - 44.1 KHz, 2 - 32 KHz, 3 - Reserved).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a pointer to the sample rate information of each channel pair.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the ASX information decoded from audio control packet.

detaileddescription.para: Bit 0 - Channel 1 & 2 Asx Bit 1 - Channel 3 & 4 Asx
Bit 15 - Channel 31 & 32 Asx

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is a pointer to the Asx status information of each channel pair.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to soft reset the XSdiAud registers.It resets all the configuration registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to soft reset the XSdiAud core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.
is to enable or disable. When set to 1(i.e.enable), it resets the embedded core. When set to 0, it clears the reset (i.e.disable).

briefdescription.para: This function returns a reference to an XSdiAud_Config structure based on the core id, DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xsdiaud_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the XSdiAud core for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XsdiAud instance such that the driver is ready to use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance to be worked on.

is the unique id of the device controlled by this XSdiAud instance. Passing in a device id associates the generic XSdiAud instance to a specific device, as chosen by the caller or application developer.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if the device was not found in the configuration such that initialization could not be accomplished.

briefdescription.para: Runs a self-test on the driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: The self-test reads the XSdi_Aud registers and verifies the value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful i.e. if the self test passes.
XST_FAILURE if unsuccessful i.e. if the self test fails

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the XSdiaud driver.

detaileddescription.para:
This handler reads the pending interrupt from the XSdiaud peripheral, determines the source of the interrupts, clears the interrupts and calls call backs accordingly.
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XSdiaud instance.
None.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType.

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function ------------------------------------ ---------------------------------- (XSDIAUD_HANDLER_AUD_GRP_CHNG_DET) GrpChangeDetHandler (XSDIAUD_HANDLER_CNTRL_PKT_CHNG_DET) CntrlPktDetHandler (XSDIAUD_HANDLER_CHSTAT_CHNG_DET) StatChangeDetHandler (XSDIAUD_HANDLER_FIFO_OVRFLW_DET) FifoOvrflwDetHandler (XSDIAUD_HANDLER_PARITY_ERR_DET) ParityErrDetHandler (XSDIAUD_HANDLER_CHECKSUM_ERR_DET) ChecksumErrDetHandler

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud core instance.
specifies the type of handler.
is a pointer to the callback function.
is a reference pointer passed on actual calling of the callback function.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: Audio Embed total number of bytes in the 6 channel status registers.
This macro returns the XSdiAud operating mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the XSdiAud UHD-SDI standard.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud core instance.

simplesect.para: UHD-SDI standard 0: 3G SDI 1: 6G SDI 2: 12G SDI 8DS 3: 12G SDI 16DS

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the XSdiAud Channel field of the GUI register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud core instance.

simplesect.para: Channel field of the GUI register i.e. a value in between 0 to 7

detaileddescription.para: Contains an basic self-test API.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kar 02/14/18 Initial release. 1.1 kar 04/25/18 Changed Set Clk Phase API's 2nd argument description. 2.0 vve 09/27/18 Add 32 channel support Add support for channel status extraction logic both on embed and extract side. Add APIs to detect group change, sample rate change, active channel change

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kar 02/15/18 Initial release. 1.1 kar 04/25/18 Added new line standards. Added new API to enable rate control. Removed inline function which reads the IP version. 2.0 vve 09/27/18 Add 32 channel support Add support for channel status extraction logic both on embed and extract side. Add APIs to detect group change, sample rate change, active channel change

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kar 02/14/18 Initial release. 1.1 kar 04/25/18 Removed version register offset. Added rate control enable shift and mask. 2.0 vve 09/27/18 Add 32 channel support Add support for channel status extraction logic both on embed and extract side. Add APIs to detect group change, sample rate change, active channel change

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kar 02/14/18 Initial release. 2.0 vve 09/27/18 Add 32 channel support Add support for channel status extraction logic both on embed and extract side. Add APIs to detect group change, sample rate change, active channel change

Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kar 02/14/18 Initial release. 1.1 kar 04/02/18 Added new macros for UHD-SDI standard and channels. 2.0 vve 09/27/18 Add 32 channel support Add support for channel status extraction logic both on embed and extract side. Add APIs to detect group change, sample rate change, active channel change
